race.description: Sportsbet Up & Coming Stars Series Heat 5 Maiden Plate
race.comment: Rich maiden that is part of the Up & Coming Series and a number of the combatants come through the same races, one over 1200m at Caulfield and another over 1300m at Ararat. The Caulfield one naturally looks stronger and HOT SAND (4) was first home of those engaged here. He was specked at decent odds and was strong through the line, so the step to 1400m looks a plus. GENOMIC (3) did pull ground off HOT SAND late, though, and he was on debut there so he's probably open to even more improvement. OYSTER LANE (7) split HOT SAND and Geonomic but he did appear to have every chance on-speed but gets the chance to dictate again from the inside alley. CORVIGLIA (2) made debut four months ago at Pakenham when finished third, beaten only 1.25 lengths when well-backed. Fitter for recent trials and should be in the mix fresh. LIVE FOREVER (5) finished like Chatauqua to just miss in the Ararat race. He's the horse to take out of that race, especially up to 1400m.
